courses: Analog Integrated Circuit Design and Analysis

extra.name: Band Society at the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

projects.name: Low Noise Amplifier
projects.summary: Built a low noise amplifier for a radio communication purpose using 22nm technology that performs at 28GHz center frequency, 16dB gain, 2.25dB NF, and 20mW power consumption.

projects.name: Successive Approximation Register Analog-to-Digital Converter (SAR ADC)
projects.summary: Built a SAR ADC using 180nm technology that performs at a 2MS/s sampling rate, 10-bit resolution, and 9.09 ENOB, 1.92mW power consumption using a monotonic switching procedure.

projects.name: Two Stage Differential Input Single-Ended Output Operational Amplifier
projects.summary: Built a two-stage operational amplifier using 180nm technology that performs at 1.8V supply voltage, 55.7dB gain, 348MHz unity-gain frequency, 1.58 Vpp output voltage swing, and 1.79mW power consumption.

projects.name: Full Adder
projects.summary: Built a 4-bit Full Adder using 180nm technology and delivered DRC and LVS clean layout. The design performs at 1.8V supply voltage, 1.37ns propagation delay, 531um2 area, and 2.87pW power consumption.

projects.name: Electronic Music Box
projects.summary: Created a music box that can play music with various sound effects such as low pass filter, high pass filter, volume control, pitch control, tempo control, and timelapse with an interactive display.
